mapper.select: /*MstoreMapper.getMstoreSSOInfo*/ SELECT USERID ,EMPEN ,MBR_GRD_CD ,LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM NMCP_MSTORE_SSO_INFO WHERE USERID= #{userId} AND SYS_CDATE IS NULL
/*MstoreMapper.getMcpUserCntrMngInfo*/ SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM (SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG WHERE USERID= #{userId} ORDER BY REP_NO) WHERE ROWNUM= 1

SELECT MCI.CONTENT_SEQ , MCI.ITEM_SEQ , MCI.ITEM_TYPE , MCI.NAME , MCI.URL , MCI.ORIGINAL_PRICE , MCI.DISCOUNT_PRICE , MCI.IMG_URL_PC AS IMG_URL FROM NMCP_MSTORE_CONTENT_ITEM MCI , ( SELECT MAX(CONTENT_SEQ) AS CONTENT_SEQ FROM NMCP_MSTORE_CONTENT WHERE DEVC_TP_CD = '20' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS') MC WHERE MC.CONTENT_SEQ = MCI.CONTENT_SEQ

SELECT MCI.CONTENT_SEQ , MCI.ITEM_SEQ , MCI.ITEM_TYPE , MCI.NAME , MCI.URL , MCI.ORIGINAL_PRICE , MCI.DISCOUNT_PRICE , MCI.IMG_URL_MO AS IMG_URL FROM NMCP_MSTORE_CONTENT_ITEM MCI , ( SELECT MAX(CONTENT_SEQ) AS CONTENT_SEQ FROM NMCP_MSTORE_CONTENT WHERE DEVC_TP_CD = '30' AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS') MC WHERE MC.CONTENT_SEQ = MCI.CONTENT_SEQ
